x 128 128 549 131 4 16 Gyrator Bandpass Filter (series RLC using simulated L)
x 128 280 586 283 4 12 The gyrator simulates an inductor. With series C and load R,
x 128 300 491 303 4 12 this forms a bandpass filter centered near the LC resonance.
